0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h1","children":"Sleep Consolidation"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne's background process that promotes aged Working Memory entries to Episodic Memory, inspired by human sleep's role in memory consolidation."}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"What Sleep Does"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"During each consolidation cycle, Mnemosyne:"}],"\n",["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Scans"}]," Working Memory for entries older than TTL/2 (12 hours by default)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Groups"}]," candidates by ",["$","code",null,{"children":"source"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Summarizes"}]," each group via local LLM (TinyLlama) or AAAK text substitution"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Promotes"}]," summaries to Episodic Memory (with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"summary_of"}]," tracking originals)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Evicts"}]," original Working Memory entries"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Trigger Conditions"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Consolidation triggers on:"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Age threshold"}],": When Working Memory entries exceed TTL/2 (default: 12 hours with 24h TTL)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Explicit call"}],": ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mem.sleep()"}]," or ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mem.consolidate()"}]," for manual consolidation"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"auto_sleep"}],": Background thread that periodically runs consolidation without explicit calls (configure via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"config.yaml"}]," or ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_AUTO_SLEEP"}]," env var)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Shutdown"}],": Graceful process exit"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Consolidation Pipeline"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"chart":"\nflowchart LR\n  A[Working Memory] -->|age > TTL/2| B[Candidate Selection]\n  B -->|group by source| C[Group Entries]\n  C -->|summarize| D[LLM or AAAK]\n  D -->|promote| E[Episodic Memory]\n  C -->|evict originals| F[Delete from Working]\n"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Step-by-Step"}],"\n",["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Candidate selection"}],": Find all Working Memory entries where ",["$","code",null,{"children":"created_at < now - TTL/2"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Group by source"}],": Cluster candidates by their ",["$","code",null,{"children":"source"}]," field"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Summarize"}],": For each group, generate a summary using:","\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Local LLM (TinyLlama) if available"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["AAAK ",["$","code",null,{"children":"encode()"}]," text substitution as fallback"]}],"\n"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Promote"}],": Insert summary into ",["$","code",null,{"children":"episodic_memory"}]," with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"summary_of"}]," referencing the original IDs"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Evict"}],": Delete the original entries from ",["$","code",null,{"children":"working_memory"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Log"}],": Record the consolidation in ",["$","code",null,{"children":"consolidation_log"}]]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Retention Values"}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Parameter"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Default"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_WM_MAX"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"10000"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Maximum Working Memory entries"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"TTL"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"24h"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Time-to-live for Working Memory entries"}]]}]]}]]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Monitoring Consolidation"}],"\n","$L4","\n","$L5","\n","$L6"],["$L7"],"$L8"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"zj_hjOJvNkOONB6cRNspF"}
4:["$","p",null,{"children":["Consolidation events are logged to the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"consolidation_log"}]," table:"]}]
5:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Column"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Type"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"id"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"INTEGER"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Auto-increment primary key"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"session_id"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"TEXT"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Session that was consolidated"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"items_consolidated"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"INTEGER"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Number of entries promoted"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"summary_preview"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"TEXT"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Preview of the generated summary"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"created_at"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"TIMESTAMP"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"When consolidation ran"}]]}]]}]]}]
6:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L9",null,{"iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 16v-4","key":"1dtifu"}],["path",{"d":"M12 8h.01","key":"e9boi3"}]],"className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Performance Impact"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"Sleep consolidation runs in a background thread and does not block agent operations. On typical hardware, a full cycle processes ~1000 entries in under 5 seconds."}]}]]}]]}]}]
